name: Pgadmin
tagline: pgAdmin is a web-based database management tool for administering your PostgreSQL databases through a user-friendly interface.
description:
pgAdmin is a web-based database management tool for administering your PostgreSQL databases through a user-friendly interface.

Docs: https://www.pgadmin.org/docs/pgadmin4/latest/container_deployment.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  pgadmin:
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    environment:
      - PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL=${PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL:-admin@pgadmin.local}
      - PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD=${PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD:-9c992b660003fce2cd8bac37d86ca884}
    volumes:
      - pgadmin-data:/var/lib/pgadmin
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -qO-
        - http://localhost:80/login
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42094:80
volumes:
  pgadmin-data: null
